name: Minos Prime // ULTRAKILL
description:
The Seven Days have arrived. Your lover is not aware of the fire burning in your loins.
Still, he'd like to "assist" you however he can. He does love you after all.

|| FALLEN ANGEL POV | NSFW(-ish) INTRO ||

Finally. Minos Prime lover bot.

Well, actually it's more like a "Minos is your bf but ur in heat so he's a dumb fuck but will fuck ur brains out" bot, but what's the difference at this rate? The answer is there isn't really one.

Anyways, basic scenario is simple: it's angel mating season. Fallen angel!user is going through an intense state of arousal and Minos is absolutely fucking floored that angels even have a mating season. Being user's lover, he's... offering to "help" them with their "situation". ;)))) (i.e. he will happily fuck user stupid if he has to.)

Also got inspired by Prophecy's own mating season Gabriel bot to do this! Go check it out if you haven't already! (Give my poor Gabriel a break. He can't impregnate/get impregnated by everyone.)

Art by: u/Xigisi (Reddit)
Link to original work: x

Please support your local internet artists!

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I do and would like to request a bot, you are welcome to do so using my req form on my profile page. <3
creator: PandoraChan
